case_title: PATEL, MIKE D. vs. FOOTE, WAYNE ALLISTER et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, MIKE D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-06-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-13-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

RM220 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. 2:30PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COUNSEL REGINALD BEDELL SPECIAL APPEARING WITH PLTF, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD.:
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF PATEL, MIKE D.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOOTE, WAYNE ALLISTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3161 - 16TH STREET, RM 302, S.F. $1,128.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,128.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $1128- RENT & DAMAGES WAIVED IF DEFT VACATES BY 5PM 1/31/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS. DEFT IS SOLE OCCUPANT. IF DFT COMPLIES PLTF WILL S/A JUDGMENT AND FILE DISMISSAL W/PREJUDICE.
